properties.name: Estero de Pandacan
properties.description: They used the word esteros in terms of waterways not creek.

properties.name: Estero de Alix
properties.description: After crossing Figueras Street, Legarda bends to the southwest following the course of Estero de Alix (Alix Creek). It intersects with Recto Avenue–Mendiola Street, wherein majority of its traffic turn towards Recto Avenue serving as a major continuation.
